scripts.build:soldier-components: npm run build:components && node scripts/bake-weapon-edits.mjs && node scripts/build-soldier-components.mjs --kit line-infantry && node scripts/slice-component-atlas.mjs --kit line-infantry && node scripts/build-soldier-components.mjs --kit cannon-12 && node scripts/slice-component-atlas.mjs --kit cannon-12 && node scripts/build-soldier-components.mjs --kit cuirassier && node scripts/slice-component-atlas.mjs --kit cuirassier
scripts.build: npm run build:poses && tsc --noEmit && vite build
